title: Fiedleria arabica
taxonomy: Fiedleria arabica is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Zingiberaceae. It is a genus of plants known to be native to the Arabian Peninsula. The Zingiberaceae family includes over 1,700 species of plants commonly known as ginger and related plants. These plants are primarily known for their unique fragrance and medicinal properties. Fiedleria arabica is one of the lesser-known species within this family.
